---
format:
  html:
    css: styles_test.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

:::: {.panel-tabset .nav-pills}

## Parole Eligibility

## Prison Population

## Length of Stay

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Overview

### Violent

### Property

### Drug

### Public Order

### Other


:::

## Releases from Prison

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Overview

### Violent

### Property

### Drug

### Public Order

### Other

:::

## Disparities

::::
